# Guarantee Position

A universal guarantee that one overlay style always works would be false. The defensible guarantee is process-bound:

> The system does not deploy a method as default unless it beats its comparator under the agreed metrics and guardrails.

## Accepted guarantee

The system can guarantee:

- render correctness;
- accessibility preservation;
- method naming consistency;
- controlled comparison against baselines;
- fallback to a stronger verified condition;
- non-deployment of failed variants.

## Rejected guarantee

The system cannot honestly guarantee:

- every video improves;
- every viewer benefits;
- one method is globally best;
- bionic anchors improve reading speed;
- watch time increases without measuring comprehension.
